---

total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---


## Notes

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCRing all Ida Novak-related bills into schema-compliant YAML frontmatter and deleting the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read root and nested AGENTS.MD files before entering folders, inspected 99_system before task work, used OCR/migration/schema docs for finance note frontmatter, verified related entity against the canonical entity file, preserved existing note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak. The canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/ida.md confirmed the person identity. Searching finance records found three Ida-linked purchase notes, and each note contained visible bill metadata and line items sufficient to populate the required bill schema from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. Those three purchase notes were updated in place with YAML frontmatter while preserving their original bodies, satisfying the OCR workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to three Ida-related bill notes
